target.name: maintenance_needed

values.0: No immediate maintenance need in the source maintenance baseline.
values.1: Maintenance needed in the source maintenance baseline.

target.source: Parsed from the derived maintenance baseline event description.

features.name: vehicle_age_years
features.description: Dataset reference year minus vehicle production year.

features.name: mileage_km
features.description: Current vehicle odometer reading.

features.name: mileage_bucket
features.description: Mileage grouped into low, medium, high, or very_high.

features.name: brand
features.description: Vehicle brand.

features.name: model
features.description: Vehicle model.

features.name: body_class
features.description: Vehicle body class from decoded profile data.

features.name: fuel_type
features.description: Fuel type used by the vehicle.

features.name: transmission
features.description: Vehicle transmission description.

features.name: maintenance_event_count
features.description: Number of maintenance/service events for the vehicle.

features.name: service_count_source
features.description: Service count parsed from the source maintenance baseline description.

features.name: maintenance_history_quality
features.description: Source maintenance history quality label.

features.name: maintenance_history_score
features.description: Ordinal encoding of maintenance history quality: poor=0, average=1, good=2.

features.name: km_since_last_maintenance
features.description: Current mileage minus latest non-recall maintenance event mileage.

features.name: repair_event_count
features.description: Number of repair events for the vehicle.

features.name: km_since_last_repair
features.description: Current mileage minus latest repair event mileage.

features.name: repair_cost_total
features.description: Total cost of repair events in the demo data.

features.name: refuel_event_count
features.description: Number of refuel events for the vehicle.

features.name: km_since_last_refuel
features.description: Current mileage minus latest refuel event mileage.

features.name: fuel_efficiency_km_per_liter
features.description: Fuel efficiency parsed from derived refuel event description.

features.name: tracked_part_count
features.description: Number of tracked parts for the vehicle.

features.name: avg_part_age_km
features.description: Average current mileage minus installed-at mileage for tracked parts.

features.name: avg_km_since_part_service
features.description: Average current mileage minus last service mileage for tracked parts.
